reference: I took a really hot bath; that is how I like them. My sides and back started to ache and feel cramped really badly, so I got out. All of a sudden, I felt overwhelmed. My chest got tight, I became short of breath, and my heart was pounding hard. Was that a panic attack?
text: I took a really hot bath; that is how I liked it. My sides and back started to ache, and Phil cramped really badly, so I got out. All of a sudden I felt overwhelmed. My chest got tight, I became short of breath, and my heart was pounding hard. Was that a panic attack?
